==Card Redemption==
Throughout [[Britland]], cards can be collected and exchanged for various rewards. Cards vary from tier 1 (white) to tier 5 (orange) and there's different types of each tier. Below is a list of the rewards that can be exchanged, and how many times.

==Tier 1 (White)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Top Hat, Genleman's Staff
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--white-bg);" |[[File:White Anchor.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Anchor
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +12<br>Snail DEF +12
| rowspan="7" |13 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Britland INTEL +1,500
|-
|3x1||B-tads +2,000
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|Top Hat]]
|-
|6x1||[[Gear|Gentleman's Staff]]
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg);" |[[File:Londorn Bridge.png|75px]]
|Londorn Bridge
|3x1
|Travel Speedup +1h
|200 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg);" |[[File:Great Bell.png|75px]]
|Great Bell
|4x1
|Lottery Ticket +2
|Gene Speedup +2m
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg);" |[[File:Loch Nessie.png|75px]]
|Loch Nessie
|4x1
|4k B-tads
|Britland INTEL +330
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
'''Recommended:''' Enhancement Injections, Royal Guard Bearskin Hat, Hansa Sailboat Blueprint
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Green Anchor.png|75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Anchor
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +120<br>Snail DEF +12
| rowspan="8" | 39 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Britland INTEL +3000
|-
|3x1||4k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Royal Guard Bearskin Hat</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +40
|-
|7x1||Hansa Sailboat Blueprint
|-
|8x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:River Times.png|75px]]
|River Times||3x1||Glue +10
|Evolution Chest +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Oxfort University.png|75px]]
|Oxfort University||3x1||Gear Chest +40
|Zombie Cell +100
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Cabbridge Univ..png|75px]]
|Cabbridge Univ.||4x1||[[Templar Emblem|<span style="color:var(--blue-bg)">Templar Emblem</span>]] +10
|Mecha Cell +100
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
'''Recommended:''' Enhancement Injections, Tuxedo, Yamato Warship Blueprint
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Blue Anchor.png|75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Anchor
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +14<br>Snail RUSH +14
| rowspan="8" | 117 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Britland INTEL +4500
|-
|3x1||6k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">Tuxedo</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +60
|-
|7x1||Yamato Warship Blueprint
|-
|8x1||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Parliament House.png|75px]]
|Parliament House||3x1|400 W-tads
|Refine Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Buckinham Palace.png|75px]]
|Buckinham Palace||4x1||Mutant Cell +2000
|Offering Speedup +5m
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
'''Recommended:''' Injections, Britland Crown, Turtle Ship Blueprint
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" | [[File:Purple Anchor.png|75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Anchor
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail DEF +16
| rowspan="8" | 351 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Britland INTEL +6000
|-
|3x1||8k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Britland Crown</span>]]
|-
|6x1||Gear Chest +80
|-
|7x1||Turtle Ship Blueprint
|-
|8x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" | [[File:The Londorn Eye.png|75px]]
|The Londorn Eye||4x1||Offering Speedup +4h
|Tool Chest +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg);" | [[File:John Bull.png|75px]]
|John Bull||4x1||Britland Treasure Map +50
|Britland Treasure Map +2
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
'''Recommended:''' Injections, Windsor's Cape, St. Trinidad Blueprint
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="8" style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" | [[File:Orange Anchor.png|75px]]
| rowspan="8" | Anchor
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +18<br>Snail DEF +18
| rowspan="8" | 1,053 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Britland INTEL +8000
|-
|3x1||10k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||Gear Chest +100
|-
|6x1||[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Windsor's Cape</span>]]
|-
|7x1||St. Trinidad Blueprint
|-
|8x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--orange-bg);" | [[File:Stonehenge.png|75px]]
|Stonehenge||3x1||Wish Coin +1
|15 W-tads
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
